{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Emriss's cell
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Emriss's cell]] is accessed by a scripted doorframe at the end of a hallway with [[Herald]]-level constructs.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
